title: Customer Success Representative
description: Support small business customers via phone and email. Onboard new clients, resolve issues, and ensure they get maximum value from our platform.
responsibilities: Onboard new customers through their first 30 days
Escalate complex issues to senior team

title: Front Desk Coordinator
description: Be the welcoming face of our busy wellness clinic. Greet patients, manage scheduling, handle payments, and ensure a smooth experience.
responsibilities: Answer phones and respond to enquiries

title: Client Support Specialist
description: First point of contact for customers. Resolve product issues, handle billing questions, and turn frustrated customers into loyal advocates.
responsibilities: Feed product insights back to the team

title: Guest Experience Associate
description: Deliver unforgettable stays at the front desk. Handle check-in, resolve concerns, make recommendations, and ensure every guest leaves happy.
responsibilities: Check guests in and out efficiently

title: Inside Sales Representative
description: Turn inbound leads into loyal customers. Make outbound calls, run product demos, and close deals for our SMB-focused software platform.
responsibilities: Work warm inbound leads from marketing
Close deals in a single call or follow-up

title: Retention Specialist
description: Save customers who are thinking about cancelling. Listen, empathise, problem-solve, and find creative ways to keep subscribers on our platform.
responsibilities: Handle cancellation calls and turn them around
Identify root causes of customer dissatisfaction
Offer targeted solutions and special offers
Track retention metrics and report weekly
requirements: Ability to think on your feet

title: Sales Development Representative
description: Generate pipeline for our enterprise sales team. Qualify leads, run discovery calls, and book meetings. Full training provided.
responsibilities: Make 60+ outbound calls and emails daily
Book discovery calls for Account Executives
requirements: Strong communicator with a positive attitude

title: Retail Sales Advisor
description: Help customers find the perfect tech solution. Use product knowledge and listening skills to match customers with the right products and drive store sales.
responsibilities: Approach and assist customers on the sales floor
Hit individual and team sales targets

title: Account Executive — SMB
description: Own a territory of small and mid-sized business prospects. Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to close.
responsibilities: Manage a territory of 200+ SMB accounts
Own the full sales cycle from lead to close

title: Membership Sales Consultant
description: Sell gym memberships and personal training packages to prospective and existing members.
responsibilities: Give tours and present membership options
Follow up on all leads within 2 hours

title: Business Development Representative
description: Find and develop new business relationships for our freight and logistics platform.
responsibilities: Pass qualified opportunities to senior reps

title: Retail Team Member
description: Keep our store looking great, help customers find what they need, and process transactions accurately.
responsibilities: Serve customers on the shop floor
requirements: Retail or customer service experience preferred

title: Stock and Inventory Associate
description: Keep store shelves stocked and organised. Receive deliveries, process inventory, and ensure products are correctly displayed.
requirements: Physically fit and able to lift 50lbs
Able to work early mornings or nights

title: Key Holder
description: Take responsibility for opening and closing the store. Support the management team and ensure standards are upheld at all times.
responsibilities: Lead the team during manager absences

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description: Coordinate care for patients across their entire journey — from referral to discharge.
responsibilities: Liaise between patients, clinicians, and insurers

title: Community Health Worker
description: Connect underserved community members to health resources, education, and support.
responsibilities: Connect patients to appropriate health services
requirements: Healthcare, social work, or community service background

title: Medical Receptionist
description: First point of contact for our patients. Manage a busy front desk, schedule appointments, and ensure every patient feels welcomed.
responsibilities: Check patients in and verify insurance
Answer phones and manage patient enquiries
requirements: Customer service or healthcare admin experience

title: Home Health Aide
description: Provide compassionate in-home care to elderly and disabled clients.
responsibilities: Assist with bathing, dressing, and personal hygiene
Prepare meals and assist with feeding

title: Clinical Administrative Coordinator
description: Support clinical teams with administrative coordination — scheduling, referrals, authorisations, and patient communication.
responsibilities: Support clinical team with admin tasks

title: Health Coach
description: Coach members through their health journey via video, phone, and messaging.

title: Brand Ambassador
description: Represent premium food and beverage brands at events, tastings, and activations.
responsibilities: Represent brands at 3-5 events per week
Engage consumers and deliver sampling experiences
Set up and break down event materials
requirements: Comfortable on your feet all day

title: Catering Coordinator
description: Coordinate catering logistics for weddings, corporate events, and private functions.
responsibilities: Coordinate with clients from booking to event day
Brief chefs and servers on event requirements

title: Executive Assistant
description: Support two C-suite executives with diary management, travel, correspondence, and special projects.
responsibilities: Manage complex calendars across time zones

title: Office Coordinator
description: Keep our office running smoothly. Manage supplies, coordinate meetings, support onboarding, and be the go-to person for the team.
responsibilities: Act as point of contact for building management
requirements: Previous admin or office support experience

title: Data Entry Specialist
description: Ensure data accuracy across our customer database. Input, verify, and clean large volumes of data with a focus on accuracy and speed.
requirements: High accuracy and attention to detail

title: HR Coordinator
description: Support our HR team with recruitment administration, onboarding, and employee records.

title: Operations Administrator
description: Support the operations team with scheduling, vendor coordination, documentation, and reporting.

title: Assistant Manager — Retail
description: Support the Store Manager in leading a team of 15 associates. Drive sales, maintain standards, and take ownership when the manager is away.
responsibilities: Lead and motivate a team of 15 associates
Drive daily and weekly sales targets
requirements: 2+ years retail or team leadership experience

title: Shift Supervisor
description: Lead your shift with confidence. Be responsible for the team, the quality, and the customer experience during your hours.
responsibilities: Lead and motivate 5-8 team members per shift
Ensure product quality and speed standards
requirements: Previous experience in a fast-paced customer environment
Natural leader who sets the standard

title: Operations Supervisor
description: Supervise a team of 20 warehouse operatives across the day shift. Ensure safety, productivity, and accuracy targets are met.
responsibilities: Manage daily productivity and accuracy KPIs
Brief team at start of each shift
requirements: Previous supervisory or team leadership experience

title: Restaurant Manager
description: Run the day-to-day operations of our busy restaurant. Lead a team of 25, manage schedules, control costs, and maintain standards.
responsibilities: Lead and schedule a team of 25 staff
Maintain food safety and service standards

title: District Supervisor — Field Services
description: Oversee a team of 30 field operatives across 15 client sites. Hire, train, motivate, and performance manage your team.
responsibilities: Conduct regular site visits and team check-ins
Hire and onboard new team members
Handle client escalations and quality issues

title: Support Worker — Adults
description: Support adults with learning disabilities and mental health conditions to live fulfilling, independent lives.
responsibilities: Provide daily care and emotional support
requirements: Care experience preferred but not required

title: Youth Programme Coordinator
description: Design and deliver programmes for at-risk youth aged 12–18. Build trusting relationships, run activities, and provide mentoring.
responsibilities: Develop and run weekly programme activities
Connect youth with education and employment opportunities
Maintain case notes and programme records

title: Senior Caregiver
description: Provide compassionate care to elderly clients in their homes.
responsibilities: Assist with personal hygiene and dressing
Prepare meals and assist with eating

title: Training Coordinator
description: Coordinate training programmes for corporate clients. Schedule sessions, support facilitators, and ensure a seamless learning experience.
responsibilities: Gather feedback and produce training reports

title: Life Skills Coach
description: Help individuals facing barriers to employment develop the skills and confidence they need to succeed.
responsibilities: Run group workshops on job search skills
Support clients with CV writing and interview prep
requirements: Coaching, support work, or education experience

title: Courier Driver
description: Deliver parcels to homes and businesses across your assigned territory. Complete 80-120 deliveries per day with excellent customer service.
requirements: Valid driver's licence with clean record

title: Logistics Operations Associate
description: Support the smooth flow of goods through our distribution centre. Track shipments, coordinate with carriers, and resolve delivery issues.
responsibilities: Coordinate with carriers on delivery issues

title: Dispatch Coordinator
description: Coordinate our fleet of drivers to ensure timely and efficient deliveries. Assign routes, monitor locations, and resolve issues.
responsibilities: Resolve delivery issues and customer complaints

title: Maintenance Technician
description: Maintain and repair our 300-unit residential complex across plumbing, electrical, appliance, and general maintenance.
responsibilities: Coordinate with vendors for specialist work

title: Construction Labourer
description: Join our busy residential construction team. Work alongside electricians, plumbers, and carpenters on new builds.
responsibilities: Move and manage materials on site
Maintain a clean and safe work area
Follow site safety protocols at all times

title: Facilities Coordinator
description: Coordinate maintenance, repairs, and facilities operations for a portfolio of commercial office buildings.
responsibilities: Manage work order system for all sites

title: Talent Acquisition Coordinator
description: Support our recruitment team with sourcing, scheduling, and candidate care.
responsibilities: Source candidates from LinkedIn and job boards
Schedule interviews and manage candidate pipelines
Send offer letters and complete background checks

title: HR Administrator
description: Support the HR team with day-to-day administration across the full employee lifecycle.
responsibilities: Maintain employee records and HR systems

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description: Process supplier invoices, manage payment runs, reconcile accounts, and maintain accurate financial records.

title: Junior Financial Analyst
description: Support senior analysts with financial modelling, market research, and client reporting.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Support account managers delivering campaigns for 12 client brands. Schedule content, coordinate assets, and track performance.
responsibilities: Schedule and publish social media content

title: Social Media Coordinator
description: Manage our social media presence across Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest.
responsibilities: Create and schedule 10+ posts per week
Engage with followers and respond to DMs

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Join our small engineering team as a junior developer. Work on real features from day one with strong mentorship and clear progression.
responsibilities: Build and test features under senior guidance
requirements: Basic programming skills in any language

title: Operations Analyst
description: Use data to improve how our 60-store retail operation runs. Build dashboards, identify trends, and support management decisions with clear analysis.
responsibilities: Conduct weekly and monthly performance analysis
